description: Fix: improve Google Books response handling and add Serilog logging
Fix: Allow missing description values from Google Books API improve DTO compatibility with incomplete API responses.
Refactor standardize Google Books API responses
Refactor guideline page and version page to load data from JSON files.
Support title search and improve book search UI.
Recactor book search flow to use backend Partial View with AJAX loading.
Initial release - Supports searching book information by ISBN.
